business_name.title: Business Name
business_name.description: Name of the business to analyse.

limit_per_platform.title: Reviews Limit Per Platform
limit_per_platform.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape from each platform (1–500).

export_as_file.title: Export as File
export_as_file.description: Generate a downloadable file (CSV / XLSX / JSON) stored in Key-Value store. The structured dataset is always available as a table in the Apify console and as JSON via the API — this option is only needed if you want a standalone file.
export_as_file.sectionDescription: Optional. Results are always available as a dataset (table view in console, JSON in API). Enable this only if you also need a downloadable file.

export_format.title: Export Format
export_format.description: File format — only used when 'Export as File' is enabled.
